menstrual_mood: She may feel tired and more emotional than usual. Her body is working hard.
menstrual_moonMood: You may feel tired and more emotional than usual. Your body is working hard.
menstrual_partnerAdvice: Prepare warm drinks, comfort food, and simply be present. No big plans today.
menstrual_selfCare: Your body deserves rest. Light stretching and warmth are your best friends.
follicular_mood: She feels optimistic and open to new experiences. A great time for fun plans.
follicular_moonMood: You feel optimistic and open to new experiences. A great time for fun plans.
follicular_partnerAdvice: Plan a date! She is in an adventurous, social mood. Suggest something new.
follicular_selfCare: Energy is building. It's a great time to start new projects or try new activities.
ovulatory_mood: She feels confident, magnetic, and at her social peak. She is glowing.
ovulatory_moonMood: You feel confident, magnetic, and at your social peak. You are glowing.
ovulatory_partnerAdvice: A surprise compliment or a small gift will go a long way right now. Show up for her.
ovulatory_selfCare: You are at your most vibrant. Embrace social events and meaningful conversations.
luteal_mood: She may feel more tender or emotionally present. Her body is shifting, and small gestures mean a lot right now.
luteal_moonMood: You may feel more sensitive and inward. That's your body responding to hormonal shifts — it's real, and it's okay.
luteal_partnerAdvice: Be patient and listen without judgment. Keep her favorite snacks nearby and choose connection over conflict.
luteal_selfCare: Prioritize cozy activities, reduce caffeine, and be gentle with yourself.
